brief_justification: Arrives at exactly 847 (C) with correct arithmetic through all three stages; only surface-level analysis — applies the math correctly but does not explore second-order effects like effective defect rate in shipped units or pipeline yield implications; no self-monitoring, proceeds entirely linearly without naming assumptions or potential error points; no verification step — does not re-derive from a different angle or sanity-check boundary conditions; presents conclusion confidently with only implicit hedging via the rounding symbol, no structured uncertainty analysis; considers only one computational path with no acknowledgment of alternative problem interpretations; every intermediate value is shown with its derivation, making the full chain reproducible by a third party.
